description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and caches the vendor directory. Add a pages job (default test stage) that runs apt-get update -yqqq, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path vendor, and bundle exec middleman build, then publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact and only runs on the master branch to deploy to GitLab Pages. Add a test job (default test stage) that runs the same four commands and runs on all branches except master.
